xero.description: Official Xero MCP Server (https://github.com/xeroapi/xero-mcp-server) — contacts, chart of accounts, invoices, bank transactions, manual journals, payroll. Requires Xero Custom Connection credentials. Set up at https://developer.xero.com/documentation/guides/oauth2/custom-connections/

sage.description: Sage 50 / Sage 200 / Sage Business Cloud — UK's most widely used SMB accounting platform.

freeagent.description: FreeAgent — accounting software for UK freelancers and sole traders.

quickbooks-uk.description: QuickBooks UK — cloud accounting with UK-specific VAT, CIS, and MTD support.

hmrc-mtd.description: HMRC Making Tax Digital API — VAT return submission, obligation retrieval, and ITSA quarterly updates.

companies-house.description: Companies House API — company search, filing history, officers, PSC register, accounts filing.

open-banking.description: Open Banking API — AISP access to UK bank accounts for real-time balances and transaction feeds.

wise.description: Wise API — multi-currency business account, international payments, and transaction history.
